p.c: function[T0: Mul](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 = x2 * x0 = semiconj_by[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[M](a, x, y)
function[T0: MulZeroClass](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.0 = T0.0 }[M](a)

not semiconj_by(a, M.0, M.0) or a * M.0 = M.0 * a

function[T0: MulZeroClass](x0: T0) { T0.0 * x0 = T0.0 }[M](x)
function[T0: MulZeroClass](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.0 = T0.0 }[M](y)

not semiconj_by(M.0, x, y) or y * M.0 = M.0 * x
y * M.0 != M.0 * x or semiconj_by(M.0, x, y)
